items.english: In Malta there are many interesting places.

items.maltese: L-Imdina hija belt qadima u sabiħa.
items.english: Mdina is an old and beautiful city.
The Catacombs are a famous historical place.
I like to go to museums.
Once I went to Blue Grotto.

items.maltese: Darba mort Muża nara esebizzjoni tal-arti.
items.english: Once I went to Muża to see an art exhibition.
Ġgantija is a big temple.

items.maltese: L-irdumijiet ta' Ħad-Dingli huma sbieħ ħafna.
items.english: The Dingli cliffs are very beautiful.
The views are beautiful and quiet.
Malta does not have big waterfalls.
I like to go to festivals in summer.
There is a music festival in the city.
Some people like the beer festival.
Others like the wine festival.
Carnival is a popular tradition.
Prinjolata is a traditional dessert.
In prinjolata there is cream and chocolate.

items.maltese: Xi kultant hemm ukoll ġewż u perlini.
items.english: Sometimes there are also walnuts and sugar pearls.
I like historical places.
My sister likes modern places.

items.maltese: Huwa jmur il-pjazza kull nhar ta' Sibt.
items.english: He goes to the square every Saturday.
She goes to the museum with her friends.

items.maltese: Aħna mmorru l-Belt Valletta xi kultant.
items.english: We go to Valletta sometimes.
Do you go to carnival?
They go to see a famous monument.

items.maltese: F'Malta nistgħu naraw ħafna affarijiet interessanti.
items.english: In Malta we can see many interesting things.
The modern building is very tall.
The village is quiet and beautiful.
The monument is famous.
The church is old.
